docs.title: AnvilKanban
docs.text:
A practical multi-tool workspace for Windows.

Kanban boards, whiteboards, diagrams, code editing, and more — all in one dockable desktop app. Everything runs locally. No subscriptions, no cloud, no tracking.

Download for Windows See all features

docs.title: Everything you need, in one place
docs.text:
• Kanban Board

    Visual task management with swim lanes, backlog, and archive. Drag, prioritize, and ship.

  • Excalidraw

    Hand-drawn style diagrams and whiteboards. Sketch ideas fast, export anywhere.

  • Draw.io

    Professional flowcharts, UML, network diagrams, and more with hundreds of shape libraries.

  • Monaco Editor

    The editor behind VS Code. Full syntax highlighting for 100+ languages, right in your workspace.

  • Knowledge Base

    A searchable, linked document library. Capture and connect ideas without leaving your workflow.

  • Calendar

    Plan and track work over time. Linked to your Kanban cards and project milestones.

  • Dashboard

    At-a-glance summaries of your active projects, recent work, and team activity.

  • Document Browser

    Browse, search, and open project documents without leaving the app.

docs.title: Why AnvilKanban?
docs.text: Download AnvilKanban

docs.title: Private by default
docs.text: All your data stays on your machine. No accounts, no sync servers, no cloud storage. SQLite files you own and control.

docs.title: Works offline
docs.text: Every tool works without an internet connection. Your workflow never depends on a third-party service being up.

docs.title: Flexible workspace
docs.text: Dockable panels let you arrange any combination of tools side by side. Save layouts per project.

docs.title: VS Code inspired
docs.text: Dark and light themes that match your development environment. Familiar shortcuts, familiar feel.

docs.title: Changelog
docs.text: All notable changes to AnvilKanban will be documented here.

docs.title: Unreleased
docs.text: • Initial public release in preparation

docs.title: Latest Release
docs.text:
Coming soon

A public release is in preparation. Check back here or watch the repository for release announcements.

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text:
• OS: Windows 10 or Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • Runtime: .NET 8 Desktop Runtime (included in self-contained build)
  • WebView2: Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime (included with Windows 11; auto-installs on Windows 10)
  • Disk: ~150 MB

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
1. Download the latest ZIP from the releases page
  2. Extract to a folder of your choice (e.g. C:\Tools\AnvilKanban\)
  3. Run Anvil.exe

No installer required. No registry entries. To uninstall, delete the folder.

docs.title: Data & Privacy
docs.text:
AnvilKanban stores all data in a local SQLite database (anvil.db) in your application data folder. Nothing is sent to any server.

To back up your data, copy the .db file.

docs.title: Features
docs.text: AnvilKanban is a dockable multi-tool desktop workspace for Windows. Every tool runs locally — no internet required, no accounts needed.

docs.title: Kanban Board
docs.text:
Visual card-based workflow with fully customizable swim lanes.

  • Drag-and-drop cards between lanes
  • Tag system for categorization and filtering
  • Backlog and archive discipline built in
  • Real-time search across all cards

docs.title: Backlog
docs.text:
A calm, searchable inventory of uncommitted work.

  • Browse all uncommitted cards without clutter
  • Filter by tag, date, or keyword
  • Commit cards to active Kanban lanes with one click

docs.title: Archive
docs.text:
Long-term storage for completed work.

  • Move finished cards off the board without deleting them
  • Browse and search historical work
  • Restore archived cards to active lanes

docs.title: Excalidraw
docs.text:
Hand-drawn style diagrams and whiteboards — fast, expressive, easy to share.

  • Freehand drawing, shapes, arrows, and text
  • Export to PNG, SVG, or Excalidraw JSON
  • Offline-capable, no external services

docs.title: Draw.io
docs.text:
Professional diagramming with the full Draw.io shape library.

  • UML, flowcharts, ERD, network diagrams
  • Layers, groups, and complex layouts
  • SVG and PNG export

docs.title: Mermaid
docs.text:
Generate diagrams from code — version control friendly.

  • Flowcharts, sequence diagrams, Gantt charts
  • Live preview as you type
  • Export to SVG

docs.title: Monaco Editor
docs.text:
The editor engine behind VS Code, embedded directly in your workspace.

  • Syntax highlighting for 100+ languages
  • IntelliSense, autocomplete, multi-cursor
  • Find and replace with regex support

docs.title: Knowledge Base
docs.text:
A searchable, linked document library for capturing and connecting ideas.

  • Create and link documents with Markdown
  • Full-text search across all entries
  • Organize by tags and categories

docs.title: PDF Viewer
docs.text:
View and navigate PDF documents without leaving your workspace.

  • Fast rendering with zoom and search
  • Bookmarks and page navigation
  • Print support

docs.title: Dashboard
docs.text:
At-a-glance summaries of active projects and recent work.

  • Card counts by lane and project
  • Recent activity feed

docs.title: Calendar
docs.text:
Plan work over time with project-linked calendar views.

  • View and schedule Kanban cards by date
  • Milestone tracking

docs.title: Document Browser
docs.text:
Browse and open project files without switching applications.

  • Folder tree navigation
  • Quick-open recent documents

docs.title: Platform
docs.text: Feature Details Platform Windows 10 / 11 Framework .NET 8, WinForms, WebView2 Storage Local SQLite database Internet required No Account required No License See Download
